name: ENDONOVO THERAPEUTICS, INC.
summary: PART I . Overview Endonovo Therapeutics, Inc. (Endonovo or the Company) is an innovative biotechnology company that has developed a bio-electronic approach to regenerative medicine. The Company develops, manufactures, and distributes evolutionary medical devices focused on the rapid healing of wounds and reduction of pain, edema and inflammation on and in the human body.
